methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Defense & Security (found 0 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 21 same-sector peers exist in Defense & Security, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use

data.narrative:
Primoco UAV is a publicly-listed Defense & Security company founded by Ladislav Semetkovský. The valuation universe comprises 21 same-sector peers: 2 public comparables (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and 8 private firms including Anduril Industries, Scale AI, Saronic, Flock Safety, and Shield AI. The company has raised €44M+ with a documented orderbook.

Peer-median valuation methodology is not applicable here. The Defense & Security sector lacks sufficient narrow-stage or tier-matched comparables—zero same-stage, zero adjacent-stage, and zero similar-valuation-tier peers met the minimum threshold of three datapoints required for reliable triangulation. A cross-sector median would introduce material distortion given the specialized nature of defense technology. The public comp set of two firms is too sparse to support robust EV/revenue or EV/EBITDA multiples.

Without sufficient peer clustering, traditional multiples-based triangulation cannot be reliably executed on the data provided. The €44M+ capital raised and orderbook represent real financial traction but do not themselves establish a valuation floor or ceiling without reference pricing. Key uncertainties include the scale and duration of the documented orderbook, defense sector contract visibility, and the appropriate risk discount relative to the two public peers. A complete valuation would require either expansion of the comparable set to adjacent sectors (Aerospace, Advanced Manufacturing) or reliance on alternative methods (DCF, precedent transactions) not included in this dataset.
